---
title: "codebook"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# import codebook.csv
codebook <- read.csv(file.path("..", "other_docs", "protocol resources", "codebook.csv"), header = TRUE) %>%
  select(
    name = Name, data_type = Data.type, unit = Unit, description= Description, dataset = Dataset
  )
```

```{r}
library(gt)
# print codebook (when dataset = "madymo") as table to the viewer pane
codebook %>%
  filter(dataset == "nhtsa") %>%
  gt()
```
